Description

De'Longhi Dinamica automatic espresso machine. Makes perfect espresso, cappuccino, and latte. Built-in grinder. Recently serviced and descaled.

Specifications

Type Automatic

Capacity 1.8L water tank
Pressure 15 bar
Colour Titanium
